properties.name: Mount Mitchell
properties.note: Highest peak east of the Mississippi River.

properties.name: Clingmans Dome
properties.note: Highest point in Tennessee and on the entire Appalachian Trail.

properties.name: Mount Washington
properties.note: Highest peak in the Northeast; some of the worst recorded weather on Earth.

properties.name: Mount Marcy
properties.note: Highest point in New York State.

properties.name: Katahdin
properties.note: Northern terminus of the Appalachian Trail; highest point in Maine.

properties.name: Spruce Knob
properties.note: Highest point in West Virginia and on the Appalachian Plateau.

properties.name: Mont Jacques-Cartier
properties.note: Highest peak in southern Quebec and the Canadian Appalachians; an arctic-alpine summit roamed by woodland caribou.

properties.name: Mount Carleton
properties.note: Highest point in the Maritimes (New Brunswick).

properties.name: White Hill
properties.note: Highest point in Nova Scotia, on the Cape Breton plateau.

properties.name: The Cabox
properties.note: Highest point on the island of Newfoundland, in the Lewis Hills.

properties.name: Gros Morne
properties.note: Iconic flat-topped peak in Gros Morne National Park — a UNESCO World Heritage site where the Tablelands expose the Earth's mantle.
